parameters.text:
=📋 Your meals today ({{ $json.totalMeals }} total):

{{ $json.mealsList || "No meals logged yet today." }}

=✏️ Meal updated successfully!

New entry: {{ $("Prepare Edit Data").item.json.meal }}

🏥 Health Chatbot Commands:

/log <meal> - Log a meal (e.g., /log Breakfast: Oatmeal)
/view - View today's meals
/edit <number> <new meal> - Edit a meal (e.g., /edit 1 Breakfast: Yogurt)
/delete <number> - Delete a meal (e.g., /delete 1)
/help - Show this help message
❓ Unknown command. Type /help to see available commands.

parameters.content:
Secondary Task: Health Chatbot [25 marks]
Build a simple health chatbot on Telegram where users can:
Log meals
Track their day
Edit logged meals
Delete logged meals
This can be kept lightweight in scope. Focus on clean command handling and reliable data storage.
